---
title: "Research and Spatial Decision Work"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<div class="hero-shell">
<div class="hero-copy">
<p class="eyebrow">Research, code, and decision analytics</p>
<h2 class="hero-heading">Jaeseok Hwang</h2>
<p class="hero-lead">PhD candidate in Applied Economics building spatial analysis, economic decision models, and applied research systems around field data, uncertainty, and risk.</p>
<p class="hero-lead">The homepage now focuses on three dissertation chapters and one new public research platform.</p>
<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="action-link" href="research/index.html">Open Research Atlas</a>
<a class="action-link secondary" href="research/working_papers.html">Open Spatial Decision Lab</a>
<a class="action-link secondary" href="resume/Resume_Jaeseok.pdf" target="_blank">Resume PDF</a>
<a class="action-link ghost" href="https://github.com/jaeseokh" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
<a class="action-link ghost" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jaeseok-hwang-0b06741a1" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="hero-panel">
<p class="eyebrow">Current focus</p>
<div class="chip-row">
<span class="chip">Spatial analysis</span>
<span class="chip">Economic decisions</span>
<span class="chip">Validation risk</span>
<span class="chip">GitHub-first</span>
</div>
<div class="metric-grid">
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Main frame</div>
<div class="metric-value">Three connected dissertation chapters</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Technical stack</div>
<div class="metric-value">Python, R, SQL, GeoPandas, XGBoost</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Research lens</div>
<div class="metric-value">Holdouts, uncertainty, structural checks</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Public output</div>
<div class="metric-value">Visual results, contribution, challenge</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

## Main Sections {.unnumbered}

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Chapter 1

<div class="surface">
<p class="eyebrow">Transferability of Multi-Field Information</p>
<h3>Can information learned in one field be trusted in another field?</h3>
<p>This chapter studies whether a model that looks strong in one environment still supports reliable decisions when moved to a different field.</p>

<div class="metric-grid">
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Simple visual result</div>
<div class="metric-value">Holdout field maps and transfer-risk comparisons</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Main contribution</div>
<div class="metric-value">Shows that predictive fit alone is not enough for deployment</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Data</div>
<div class="metric-value">Field-level spatial data, management records, and response outcomes</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Main logic and methods</div>
<div class="metric-value">Cross-field holdouts with XGBoost and Random Forest validation</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="action-link" href="research/chapter1.html">Open chapter page</a>
<a class="action-link ghost" href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/value_multifield_python" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>

## Chapter 2

<div class="surface">
<p class="eyebrow">Information Validity and Profitability Risk</p>
<h3>Which part of weak profitability comes from the decision, and which part comes from shocks?</h3>
<p>This chapter separates controllable decision error from exogenous weather and market shocks so poor outcomes are not misread.</p>

<div class="metric-grid">
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Simple visual result</div>
<div class="metric-value">Decomposition charts and realized-versus-optimal curves</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Main contribution</div>
<div class="metric-value">Separates decision-driven loss from uncontrollable external variation</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Data</div>
<div class="metric-value">Input decisions, realized outcomes, weather, price, and uncertainty measures</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Main logic and methods</div>
<div class="metric-value">Bayesian hierarchical modeling and profitability-risk decomposition</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="action-link" href="research/chapter2.html">Open chapter page</a>
<a class="action-link ghost" href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/corn_seed_response" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>

## Chapter 3

<div class="surface">
<p class="eyebrow">Value of Information in Stochastic Environments</p>
<h3>When does extra information improve decisions enough to be worth using?</h3>
<p>This chapter treats information as an economic asset and studies whether monitored signals change action quality enough to create value.</p>

<div class="metric-grid">
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Simple visual result</div>
<div class="metric-value">Paired-strip comparisons and downside-risk views</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Main contribution</div>
<div class="metric-value">Shows that information matters only when it changes decision quality</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Data</div>
<div class="metric-value">Paired-strip experiments, monitored signals, and profitability outcomes</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Main logic and methods</div>
<div class="metric-value">GAMs, causal forests, and treatment-effect interpretation under uncertainty</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="action-link" href="research/chapter3.html">Open chapter page</a>
<a class="action-link ghost" href="https://github.com/jaeseokh/value_multifield_ofpe" target="_blank">GitHub repo</a>
</div>
</div>

## Spatial Decision Lab

<div class="surface">
<p class="eyebrow">New public research platform</p>
<h3>Spatial analysis, API data, and economic decision logic</h3>
<p>This page is reserved for the new research direction focused on spatial analysis, API data, index-driven mechanisms, and economic interpretation for growers, firms, and government.</p>

<div class="metric-grid">
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Track 1</div>
<div class="metric-value">Spatial results and map-based comparison</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Track 2</div>
<div class="metric-value">API pipelines, SQL structure, and index construction</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Track 3</div>
<div class="metric-value">Decision mechanisms for growers, firms, and government</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-label">Status</div>
<div class="metric-value">Platform scaffold live, detailed content next</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="action-link" href="research/working_papers.html">Open Spatial Decision Lab</a>
</div>
</div>
:::
